subject: fix(debug): include diagnostics detail in Copy All report
body:
The Copy All button only included the event log, omitting the
diagnostics section entirely. The diagnostics-ran event also stripped
the detail field, showing only label and status.

Now formatDebugReport() accepts an optional diagnostics array and
renders a full "Diagnostics" section with status icons, labels, and
detail text before the event log. The diagnostics-ran event log entry
also includes the detail field for completeness.

Tags: debug, diagnostics, clipboard, mobile
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: debug-banner
Semver: patch
